2066748409273561242.full_text:
🚨 ‘India is the biggest cricket market’ - Arun Dhumal backs BBL’s Chennai opener 🚨

IPL Chairman Arun Dhumal said 🗣️,

"See, India is the biggest cricket market. So definitely, Cricket Australia would want to capitalize on that. And we wish them all the best for their Big Bash inaugural game this season.
India, being the leader in world cricket, has a lot of scope to add to world cricket. Since now cricket is becoming part of Olympics, it augurs very well for the game, for its global footprint to reach to the length and breadth across the globe. I'm sure they would have done their calculations and they are expecting a good boost to their domestic tournament."

2066747734288425082.full_text:
🚨 Hardik Pandya Forced the Indian T20I Team to Change Forever 🚨

Recently Vikrant Gupta revealed that after India's defeat to England in the 2022 T20 World Cup semifinal, Hardik Pandya was furious. He criticized the top order for batting too slowly and leaving the lower order with an impossible task. 

In that match, Rohit Sharma scored 27 off 28 balls and Virat Kohli made 50 off 40. Hardik, however, played a blazing knock of 63 from just 33 balls, giving India a competitive total despite the slow start.

Following the loss, Rohit Sharma held a team meeting and echoed Hardik's concerns. The message was clear: India needed fearless intent from ball one. Since then, the team has embraced an aggressive T20 approach.

Ashok Sharma has been called up for India A amid the Tri series against Sri Lanka and Afghanistan.

He will replace injured Yudhvir Singh for the series.
